Hello Karina. Thank you for the meeting on Tuesday. What are you going to do next?
Hello Robert. Next week, I am going to prepare a full proposal for you.
That is great. What is your goal for the proposal?
My goal is the best price and the best service. I hope to finish before the deadline on Friday.

Hello Karina, this is Robert Pierce from Falcon Aviation. Thank you very much for the meeting on Tuesday. It was very good. Now I want to tell you our next steps. Next week, I am going to talk to my team about your aircraft. We are going to prepare a short report, and I am going to send it to you very soon. I have a goal: I hope to make a decision before the end of the month. The deadline for our budget is next Friday, so I will call you again on Thursday. I am also going to invite my manager to our next meeting. I think we are going to do good business together. Please send me the price list when you can. Thank you again, Karina. I will talk to you very soon. Have a great week.

Hi Robert, this is Karina Macedo. Thank you for your message, and thank you for the meeting on Tuesday. I am very happy. Now I want to share my plan. This week, I am going to prepare a full proposal for your aircraft. My goal is to give you the best price and the best service. I am going to talk to my team tomorrow, and we are going to check every detail. I hope to send you the proposal before the deadline on Friday. If you have a question, I will answer it very soon. Next month, I am going to visit your office near the airport. I think we are going to be great partners. I will call you on Thursday to confirm. Thank you again, Robert. I will speak to you soon. Have a wonderful week.

First, Karina had a good meeting with Robert on Tuesday. Then she made a plan for the proposal. Next, she is going to talk to her team and prepare every detail. After that, she will send the proposal before the deadline on Friday. Finally, she hopes to visit Robert's office next month and become a partner.
